title: Report/举报
description: This is a player report plugin. 这是一个玩家举报插件
body:
# Report / 举报
## Description / 简介
This is a player reporting plugin for Minecraft version 1.21+, where players can select the reporting content through a visual GUI interface. Administrators (who have permission to accept reports) will receive notifications and can open the visual GUI interface for management (such as one-click teleport, one-click kick, or mute). This plugin is suitable for the vast majority of server types.

这是一个我的世界1.21+版本的玩家举报插件，玩家可以通过可视化的GUI界面来选择举报内容，管理员（拥有接受权限）会收到提示，并可打开可视化gui界面进行管理（如，一键传送，一键踢出或是禁言），本插件适用于绝大多数服务器类型
![p](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8MGMSMf6/images/325fbd3da8b16a8751f83ca5d498354a978e27d0.png)
## Language support 当前支持的语言
- 简体中文 ✅

- 繁體中文 ✅

- English ✅

- Deutsch ✅

- Français ✅

- 日本語言語 ✅

## Commands 命令


/report <player> ==> Opens the player report menu.
(jubao, rp, jb)

/reportmenu ==> Opens the admin report management menu.
(rm, jubaocaidan, jbcd)



## Permissions 权限


report.use ==> Allows players to use the /report command.

report.check ==> Allows staff to receive report notifications and access admin report menus.

report.teleport ==> Allows staff to teleport to reported player's location.

report.ban ==> Allows staff to ban reported players.

report.mute ==> Allows staff to mute reported players.

report.kick ==> Allows staff to kick reported players.

report.tempban ==> Allows staff to temporarily ban reported players.
